metadata.title: AlgoCoach — Your Next Step for Every Algorithm Problem
metadata.description: Practice algorithms with guided hints, real code execution, immediate AI feedback, focused assessments, and personalized review.
metadata.keywords: AlgoCoach, AI algorithm coach, coding practice, data structures, interview preparation, guided hints, code feedback

sign.email_verification_hint: Use an email address you can access. You must verify your email after signing up.

sign.verify_email_required: Please verify your email address before signing in.
sign.resend_verification_sent: Verification email resent. Please check your inbox.

sign.verify_email_not_verified_yet: Not verified yet. Please click the link in your email first.
sign.verify_email_account_mismatch: Signed in as {current}. This page is waiting for {expected}.
sign.password_length: Password must be between 8 and 128 characters.

sign.invalid_credentials: The email or password is incorrect.
sign.account_exists: An account already exists for this email. Sign in or reset your password.
sign.sign_in_failed: Sign in failed. Please try again.

sign.social_sign_in_failed: Social sign in failed. Please try again.

sign.forgot_password_description: Enter your account email and we will send a reset link.
sign.password_reset_unavailable: Email delivery is not configured, so password reset is currently unavailable.
sign.password_reset_email_sent_description: If an account exists for this email, you will receive a password reset message. We do not confirm whether an email is registered.
sign.password_reset_request_failed: We could not send the reset email. Please try again later.
sign.reset_password_description: Choose a new password for your account.
sign.reset_password_failed: The password could not be updated. The link may have expired; request a new one.
sign.invalid_reset_link: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
sign.reset_password_success_description: You can now sign in with your new password.
sign.change_password_description: Confirm your current password, then choose a new one.
sign.change_password_success: Password updated. Sessions on other devices have been signed out.
sign.change_password_failed: Could not change the password. Check your current password and try again.
sign.change_password_session_notice: Saving will sign out sessions on your other devices.
